product: Discover files in Auto Loader efficiently using file events without enrollment…
tagline: The cloudFiles.useManagedFileEvents option with Auto Loader is now in ungated Public Preview.
what_it_does: The cloudFiles.useManagedFileEvents option with Auto Loader is now in ungated Public Preview. This option allows you to discover files efficiently. For details, see the following: (Pre requisite) Enable file events for an external location File notification mode with and without file events enabled on external locations This page describes how to configure Auto Loader streams to use file notification mode to incrementally discover and ingest cloud data.
why_it_matters: You can use file notifications to scale Auto Loader to ingest millions of files an hour.
plain_summary: The cloudFiles.useManagedFileEvents option with Auto Loader is now in ungated Public Preview. This option allows you to discover files efficiently.
